mapper.select: SELECT C.ID AS ID, C.NAME AS NAME, C.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION, C.IS_ACTIVE AS IS_ACTIVE FROM CATEGORY C ORDER BY C.ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CATEGORY (NAME, DESCRIPTION, IS_ACTIVE) VALUES (#{category.name}, #{category.description}, #{category.isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT C.ID AS ID, C.NAME AS NAME, C.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION, C.IS_ACTIVE AS IS_ACTIVE FROM CATEGORY C WHERE ID = #{ id }
